abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.no_h264: No H.264 or H.265 streams were found. Check the profile configuration on your device.
abort.no_mac: Could not set up a unique ID for the ONVIF device.

error.no_onvif_service: No ONVIF service found. Verify the port number is correct.
error.onvif_error: Error setting up the ONVIF device: {error}. Check the logs for more information.

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your ONVIF device.

configure_profile.description: Create a camera entity for {profile} at {resolution} resolution?
configure_profile.title: Configure profiles

reauth_confirm.description: Some devices will reject authentication if the time is out of sync by more than 5 seconds. If authentication is not successful, check the time on the device and try again.
reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate ONVIF device

user.description:
By selecting **Submit**, we will scan your network for ONVIF devices that support Profile S (including H.265).

Some manufacturers have started disabling ONVIF by default. Make sure ONVIF is enabled in your camera's configuration.
user.title: ONVIF device setup

ptz.description: If your ONVIF camera supports PTZ, you can pan, tilt, or zoom your camera.

continuous_duration.description: Set the ContinuousMove delay in seconds before stopping movement.
continuous_duration.name: Continuous duration

distance.description: Distance coefficient. Sets how far the PTZ should move in a single request.
distance.name: Distance

preset.description: PTZ preset profile token. Sets the preset profile token that is run with GotoPreset.
preset.name: Preset

speed.description: Speed coefficient. Sets how fast the PTZ will move.
speed.name: Speed

ptz.name: PTZ
